patches.hypothesis: The test is failing because the OptionBuilder properties are not reset before creating a new Option, causing subsequent Option creations to inherit previous properties like description.
patches.changes: - OptionBuilder.reset(); is moved before creating a new Option.
patches.diff: - OptionBuilder.reset(); is moved before creating a new Option.
